name: thesis-agent-desktop
description: Sovereign desktop control plane for MCP Spine lifecycle, approvals, tools, receipts, THESIS, MESIE, NEXUS, NOVA and MonadBuilder+.

scripts.typecheck: node --check src/main.mjs && node --check src/preload.mjs && node --check src/config.mjs && node --check src/mcp.mjs && node --check src/tools.mjs && node --check renderer/app.mjs
